main.description: An authenticated Creaton forum body encrypted under a board epoch key.

epoch.description: UTC key epoch in YYYY-MM-DD form.

salt.description: Random 32-byte salt used to derive the per-record content key.

ciphertext.description: AES-256-GCM ciphertext including its authentication tag.

committeeEpoch.description: CREATE-staked KMS committee epoch controlling release of this content key. Required by version 2.

keyEpochUri.description: Reference to the app.creaton.forum.keyEpoch record containing the threshold-wrapped board key. Required by version 2.
